title: New Component
text: New Component Create a new component signature. The implementation can be for a Uniface component or an operating system component, but not both, and any number of foreign components. Fields Name Description None Implementation in How to Define a Component Signature Related Links Component Implementations The component signature specifies the implementation a component, which determines the technology used to deploy it, such as Uniface, C, or Java.
